rulesStrings.li: tale_noun->a gathering of [GAZER_nameDef], [COMPANION_nameDef], [THIRDPAWN_nameDef], and [FOURTHPAWN_nameDef] gazing in the greenhouse
tale_noun->[GAZER_nameDef], [COMPANION_nameDef], [THIRDPAWN_nameDef], and [FOURTHPAWN_nameDef] sharing a peaceful moment under the glass
image->[GAZER_nameFull], [COMPANION_nameFull], [THIRDPAWN_nameFull], and [FOURTHPAWN_nameFull] relaxing together under a glass canopy, with [WEATHER_description], [circumstance_group]
image->[GAZER_nameFull], [COMPANION_nameFull], [THIRDPAWN_nameFull], and [FOURTHPAWN_nameFull] looking up at the sky through greenhouse glass [circumstance_group]
circumstance_phrase->with sunlight filtering through the leaves
desc_sentence->All four are looking up with expressions of peaceful serenity.
desc_sentence->Through the glass ceiling, [WEATHER_description] is visible.
desc_sentence->A variety of potted plants and growing vegetation frames the scene.
desc_sentence->[GAZER_nameDef] is pointing towards a distant cloud or star.
desc_sentence->[THIRDPAWN_nameDef] and [FOURTHPAWN_nameDef] are lounging nearby, enjoying the quiet scenery.
desc_sentence->A group of four is gathered together under the glass: [GAZER_nameDef], [COMPANION_nameDef], [THIRDPAWN_nameDef], and [FOURTHPAWN_nameDef].
